mapper.sql: id, code, name, discount_type, discount_value, min_purchase, valid_from, valid_until, max_issue, issued_count, enabled, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET issued_count = issued_count + 1 WHERE id = #{couponId} AND (max_issue IS NULL OR issued_count < max_issue)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_coupon (coupon_id, user_id, code, status, order_ref) VALUES (#{couponId}, #{userId}, #{code}, #{status}, #{orderRef})
mapper.select: SELECT id, coupon_id, user_id, code, status, issued_at, used_at, order_ref, created_at FROM user_coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND code = #{code} AND status = 'ISSUED' ORDER BY issued_at ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, coupon_id, user_id, code, status, issued_at, used_at, order_ref, created_at FROM user_coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY issued_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT uc.id, uc.code, c.name, c.discount_type, c.discount_value, c.min_purchase, uc.status, uc.issued_at, uc.used_at FROM user_coupon uc JOIN coupon c ON c.id = uc.coupon_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uc.issued_at DESC, uc.id DESC
